Jonathan Schmeller, Esq. 213-430-8115 O'Melveny & Myers LLP for Defendant. (In-person)

ARGUED. Parties state appearance. The Court announces the TR. Defense sent a timely notice to contest the demurrer. Mr. Schmeller argues; premises liability, negligent undertaking. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Off calendar. The Taylor declaration fails to show parties met and conferred regarding the operative, first amended complaint. Response to the amended complaint is now due by August 2, 2025.
